name: Centaur
special_abilities: [{"name": "Charge", "desc": "If the centaur moves at least 30 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a pike attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 10 (3d6) piercing damage."}]
actions: [{"name": "Multiattack", "desc": "The centaur makes two attacks: one with its pike and one with its hooves or two with its longbow."}, {"name": "Pike", "desc": "Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) piercing damage."}, {"name": "Hooves", "desc": "Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage."}, {"name": "Longbow", "desc": "Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage."}]
